creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #3)

I have crated this (https://salsa.debian.org/reproducible-builds/diffoscope/-/issues/98) in the first place. Before this one isn't resolved, one cannot make any additional changes to the port.

Unfortunately, I still waiting for my port changes to be committed before making progress with ports I do not maintain myself.
